title: Lab Notebook
text:
How to Explore This Notebook

Search: Use the search box to find entries by keywords
Filter by Category: Click on categories to filter entries by project or topic
Sort: Sort entries by date, title, or other criteria
Browse: Scroll through all entries in chronological order

title: Harika Mandava
text:
About Me
I am an undergraduate student (class of 2028) at William and Mary majoring in Chemistry! My research interests include computational biology and bioinformatics, particularly analyzing single-cell transcriptomic data of microbial eukaryotes to help fill gaps in phylogenetic trees and identify contamination in sequencing datasets. In my free time, I love playing video games, ultimate frisbee, and reading.
